name: Harrison Family YMCA
description: Harrison Family YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rocky Mount, NC. There are 2 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. You can reserve the courts. Players have access to lights.

name: Nashville Elementary Gym
description: Come play pickleball at Nashville Elementary Gym in Nashville, NC! There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include restrooms and lights.
fees:
Members only — Annual fee
Nashville, NC residents: $15.00
Non-residents: $25.00

name: Rocky Mount Event Center
description: Come play pickleball at Rocky Mount Event Center in Rocky Mount, NC! There are 12 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, restrooms, water, trainers or lessons, wheelchair accessibility, and youth programming. A one-time fee is required to play.
fees: Fee required — Daily Fee: $10 per person  Monthly Fee: $35 per person per month  65 & older Monthly Fee: $20 per person per month

name: South Rocky Mount Community Center
description: South Rocky Mount Community Center is a place to play pickleball in Rocky Mount, NC. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are private.

name: Sunset Park
description: Sunset Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Rocky Mount, NC. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms, water, and lights. The courts are free.

name: W.B. Ennis Memorial Park
description: There are four tennis courts with permanent pickleball lines (blue) incorporated in the layout.
